_comment: Reference values for validating Python BEA implementation against R/StateIO. To regenerate from R, run: Rscript scripts/generate_r_reference_values.R. The matrix math tests below use synthetic 3x3 matrices with known analytical solutions, so they don't depend on BEA API data.

metadata.description: Synthetic reference values for testing Leontief I-O math equivalency. Matrix math is identical regardless of data source (R StateIO or BEA API) -- only the input tables differ. These tests validate the math layer.

unit_conversion.comment: BEA tables are in millions of dollars. A $1,000,000 shock = 1.0 in BEA units. Production impact must be converted back to dollars by multiplying by 1,000,000.
